title: I am the reincarnation of Jesus Christ

enrichment.summary: Kyle, while high on marijuana, claims to be the reincarnation of Jesus Christ, citing his physical resemblance (long hair and beard), knowledge of the Bible, a religious family lineage, and the 'originality' of the claim. He proposes settling competing claims via YouTube/Skype debates and plans to run for Pope by campaigning to remove the Catholic-only requirement.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Claims to be the reincarnation of Jesus Christ, framing it as a creative and original act
Believes the historically accurate Jesus had long hair and a long beard, not short hair as depicted in movies
Thinks Jesus was half-alien but would return as a human, not in a flying saucer
Believes he should run for Pope and wants to change the rule requiring candidates to be Catholic
Proposes a democratic YouTube/Skype debate where viewers vote on who is the 'best Jesus'
